observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the internal decay and corruption seeping into even the cleanest spaces of the self
observations.summary: Dan embodies the Shadow archetype as he struggles with the pervasive decay that infiltrates his environment and self, symbolizing internal corruption and the challenge of confronting hidden darkness.

evidence.quote: Dan rolled off his cot—nearly fell, caught himself—and staggered toward the door. His room, you'll remember, was the only clean space in the house, a tiny island of order in a sea of rot. But even here, the air tasted wrong. The house's decay had seeped into everything, including the spaces that resisted it.
